name: figmaloader
description: Replace Figma's colorful loader with a generic blue or neutral loader in the desktop app or browser.

scripts.check: node --check desktop/patch-figma-loader.js && node --check extension/src/content.js && node --check extension/src/popup.js && node -e "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('extension/manifest.json', 'utf8')); console.log('manifest ok')"
